verdict.answer_first: B states the recommendation immediately: “For a side project, default to a platform like Render or Fly.” A also does, but adds more provider spread in the first sentence.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleanly: “My concrete pick: start on Fly or Render”; A is also decisive but slightly broader with “Render/Fly/Railway.”
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives a concrete pick and migration trigger without extra comparison detail.
